name: Acid Splash
description: You hurl acid at one or two nearby creatures. Targets make Dexterity saves or take acid damage.

name: Chill Touch
description: Make a ranged spell attack with a ghostly hand. On a hit, the target takes necrotic damage and cannot regain hit points until your next turn.

name: Druidcraft
description: You create a minor nature effect such as predicting weather, blooming a flower, sensory natural effects, or lighting/snuffing a small flame.

name: Fire Bolt
description: Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes fire damage, and flammable unattended objects may ignite.

name: Guidance
description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, it can add 1d4 to one ability check it makes.

name: Light
description: You touch an object and cause it to shed bright light and dim light around it. The light can be covered or dismissed.

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral floating hand appears and can manipulate simple objects within range.

name: Mending
description: This spell repairs a small break or tear in an object you touch, as long as the damage is not too large.

name: Minor Illusion
description: You create a sound or image that lasts briefly and can be recognized as illusion through careful inspection.

name: Poison Spray
description: You project poison at a creature nearby. The target makes a Constitution save or takes poison damage.

name: Prestidigitation
description: You create a small harmless magical trick such as cleaning, chilling, warming, flavoring, marking, or a tiny sensory effect.

name: Produce Flame
description: A flame appears in your hand, shedding light. You can also hurl it as a ranged spell attack that deals fire damage.

name: Ray of Frost
description: Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes cold damage and its speed is reduced until your next turn.

name: Resistance
description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, it can add 1d4 to one saving throw.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see. The target makes a Dexterity save or takes radiant damage.

name: Shillelagh
description: A club or quarterstaff you hold becomes magically empowered and can use your spellcasting ability for attacks and damage.

name: Shocking Grasp
description: Make a melee spell attack. On a hit, the target takes lightning damage and cannot take reactions until its next turn.

name: Spare the Dying
description: You touch a living creature at 0 hit points. The creature becomes stable.

name: Thaumaturgy
description: You create a minor divine wonder such as a louder voice, harmless tremors, altered flames, or sudden sensory effects.

name: Thorn Whip
description: Make a melee spell attack at range. On a hit, the target takes piercing damage and may be pulled closer.

name: Bless
description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or saving throw before the spell ends, it can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the attack roll or saving throw.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

name: Burning Hands
description: A fan of flame erupts from your hands. Creatures in the area make Dexterity saves or take fire damage.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot increases the damage.

name: Command
description: You speak a one-word command to a creature. On a failed Wisdom save, it follows the command on its next turn.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot lets you affect more creatures.

name: Cure Wounds
description: A creature you touch regains hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Detect Magic
description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you. You can use your action to see a faint aura around visible magical creatures or objects and learn the school of magic, if any.

name: Guiding Bolt
description: Make a ranged spell attack against a creature within range. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll made against it before the end of your next turn has advantage.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Healing Word
description: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Inflict Wounds
description: Make a melee spell attack against a creature. On a hit, it takes heavy necrotic damage.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot increases the damage.

name: Magic Missile
description: You create three darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range and deals 1d4 + 1 force damage.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the spell creates one more dart for each slot level above 1st.

name: Shield
description: Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from Magic Missile.

name: Aid
description: Up to three creatures gain increased hit point maximum and current hit points for the duration.
higherLevels: Using a higher-level slot increases the hit point bonus.

name: Hold Person
description: Choose a humanoid you can see. On a failed Wisdom save, it is paralyzed for the duration and can repeat the save later.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot lets you target more humanoids.

name: Lesser Restoration
description: You end one disease or one condition affecting a creature, such as blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

name: Mirror Image
description: Illusory duplicates appear around you, making attacks against you more likely to hit a duplicate instead.

name: Misty Step
description: You briefly vanish in silver mist and teleport to an unoccupied space you can see nearby.

name: Prayer of Healing
description: Up to six creatures regain hit points after a longer casting. It is not meant for emergency combat healing.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot increases the healing.

name: Scorching Ray
description: You create multiple rays of fire and make ranged spell attacks, each dealing fire damage on a hit.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot creates additional rays.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: You create a floating spectral weapon within range. When you cast the spell, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of the weapon. On a hit, the target takes force damage equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Beacon of Hope
description: Choose creatures within range. They gain advantage on Wisdom and death saves, and healing restores the maximum possible hit points.

name: Counterspell
description: You attempt to interrupt a creature casting a spell. Lower-level spells can fail automatically; stronger spells may require an ability check.
higherLevels: A higher-level slot automatically counters spells of that level or lower.

name: Dispel Magic
description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability; the DC equals 10 + the spell's level.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you automatically end spell effects on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you used.

name: Fireball
description: A bright streak flashes to a point you choose within range and blossoms into an explosion. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Haste
description: Choose a willing creature. It becomes faster, harder to hit, gains Dexterity save benefits, and gets an extra limited action each turn.

name: Revivify
description: You touch a creature that died very recently and return it to life with 1 hit point.

name: Spirit Guardians
description: You call forth spirits to protect you. They flit around you to a distance of 15 feet. Affected creatures have their speed halved in the area, and when a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Wisdom saving throw or take 3d8 radiant or necrotic damage.
higherLevels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.
